hooks.command: echo '--- Mobbitrips Web v2 ---' && echo 'Branch:' && git branch --show-current && echo 'Estado local:' && git status --short && echo '---' && git fetch --all --quiet 2>/dev/null; AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null); BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$AHEAD" != "" ] && [ "$AHEAD" -gt 0 ]; then echo "AVISO: estas $AHEAD commits DETRAS de origin. Considera: git pull --rebase"; fi; if [ "$BEHIND" != "" ] && [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Tienes $BEHIND commits sin pushear."; fi; echo '--- Ultimos commits ---' && git log --oneline -5

if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then echo ''; echo '========================================================'; echo 'AVISO: hay cambios sin commitear en esta rama.'; echo 'Antes de cerrar: git add -A && git commit -m ... && git push'; echo 'Aunque sea WIP, pushealo para que la otra maquina lo tenga.'; echo '========================================================'; fi; UP=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} 2>/dev/null); if [ "$UP" = "" ]; then echo 'AVISO: esta rama no tiene upstream. Haz: git push -u origin HEAD'; fi
